data.name: ksOptionsTitle
data.comment: Title of the Tools > Options dialog.

data.name: ksGeneralTab
data.comment: Header of the General tab in the Options dialog.

data.name: ksPluginsTab
data.comment: Header of the Plugins tab in the Options dialog.

data.name: ksPrivacyTab
data.comment: Header of the Privacy tab in the Options dialog.

data.name: ksUpdatesTab
data.comment: Header of the Updates tab in the Options dialog (Windows only).

data.name: ksUiLanguageLabel
data.comment: Label preceding the user-interface language chooser on the General tab.

data.name: ksUiLanguageNote
data.value: Some localizations are not complete and others need review. Contact FLEx_Localization@sil.org with any feedback.
data.comment: Note under the UI-language chooser about localization completeness.

data.name: ksLexicalEditUiLabel
data.comment: Label preceding the Lexical Edit UI mode (Legacy/New) chooser on the General tab.

data.name: ksUiModeLegacy
data.comment: Lexical Edit UI mode option: the classic WinForms surface.

data.name: ksUiModeNew
data.comment: Lexical Edit UI mode option: the new Avalonia surface.

data.name: ksApply
data.comment: Button to apply a Lexical Edit UI mode change live (no restart).

data.name: ksAutoOpenLastProject
data.value: When I start Language Explorer, always open the last edited project automatically
data.comment: Checkbox on the General tab: auto-open the most recently edited project at startup.

data.name: ksPluginsUnavailableNote
data.value: Open a project before configuring plugins.
data.comment: Shown on the Plugins tab when no project is open, so plugins cannot be configured.

data.name: ksPrivacyNote
data.value: FieldWorks can send basic, anonymous usage data to help improve the program. No language data is ever sent.
data.comment: Explanatory note on the Privacy tab above the usage-data opt-in.

data.name: ksOkToPing
data.comment: Checkbox on the Privacy tab: opt in to anonymous usage reporting.

data.name: ksAutoUpdate
data.comment: Checkbox on the Updates tab: enable automatic update download/install.

data.name: ksUpdateChannelLabel
data.comment: Label preceding the update-channel chooser on the Updates tab.

data.name: ksOk
data.comment: OK button that accepts the Options dialog.

data.name: ksHelp
data.comment: Help button on the chooser dialog; opens the dialog's help topic.

data.name: ksChooserEmptyOption
data.comment: The leading "clear the value" row in the chooser dialog (an atomic field set to no value).

data.name: ksChooserMustSelect
data.comment: Validation message shown (and OK disabled) when the chooser requires a selection but none is made.

data.name: ksChooserSearchPrompt
data.comment: Watermark in the search box of the hierarchical chooser; typing filters to a flat list of matches.

data.name: ksCancel
data.comment: Cancel button that dismisses the Options dialog without applying changes.

data.name: ksYes
data.comment: Yes button on a confirmation message box (affirmative choice).

data.name: ksNo
data.comment: No button on a confirmation message box (negative choice).

data.name: ksIconInformation
data.comment: Accessible name announced for the information icon on a message box.

data.name: ksIconWarning
data.comment: Accessible name announced for the warning icon on a message box.

data.name: ksIconError
data.comment: Accessible name announced for the error icon on a message box.

data.name: ksIconQuestion
data.comment: Accessible name announced for the question icon on a message box.

data.name: ksInsertEntryTitle
data.comment: Title of the Insert Entry dialog (the New-UI replacement for InsertEntryDlg).

data.name: ksInsertEntryCreate
data.comment: Button that creates the new lexical entry in the Insert Entry dialog.

data.name: ksInsertEntryLexemeFormLabel
data.comment: Label above the lexeme-form field in the Insert Entry dialog.

data.name: ksInsertEntryMorphTypeLabel
data.comment: Label above the morpheme-type chooser in the Insert Entry dialog.

data.name: ksInsertEntryGlossLabel
data.comment: Label above the gloss field in the Insert Entry dialog.

data.name: ksInsertEntryLexFormNotEmpty
data.value: The lexeme form must not be empty.
data.comment: Validation message shown when the user tries to create an entry with an empty lexeme form.

data.name: ksFindReplaceTitle
data.comment: Title of the Find/Replace pattern-setup dialog used to configure a bulk replace.

data.name: ksFindReplaceFindLabel
data.comment: Label above the Find text box in the Find/Replace pattern-setup dialog.

data.name: ksFindReplaceReplaceLabel
data.comment: Label above the Replace text box in the Find/Replace pattern-setup dialog.

data.name: ksFindReplaceMatchCase
data.comment: Find/Replace option: match the find text case-sensitively.

data.name: ksFindReplaceMatchDiacritics
data.comment: Find/Replace option: match diacritics exactly (not honored in this phase; the option is disabled).

data.name: ksFindReplaceMatchWholeWord
data.comment: Find/Replace option: match only whole words.

data.name: ksFindReplaceMatchWritingSystem
data.comment: Find/Replace option: constrain the match to a writing system (not honored in this phase; disabled).

data.name: ksFindReplaceUseRegex
data.comment: Find/Replace option: treat the find text as a regular expression (disables the literal match options).

data.name: ksFindReplaceFindEmpty
data.comment: Validation message shown when the Find text is empty in the Find/Replace dialog.

data.name: ksFindReplaceInvalidRegex
data.value: The regular expression is not valid.
data.comment: Validation message shown when the regular expression in the Find/Replace dialog does not compile.

data.name: ksConfigureColumnsTitle
data.comment: Title of the browse-table Configure Columns dialog.

data.name: ksConfigureColumnsAvailableLabel
data.comment: Label above the list of columns that can be added in the Configure Columns dialog.

data.name: ksConfigureColumnsShownLabel
data.comment: Label above the list of currently-shown columns in the Configure Columns dialog.

data.name: ksConfigureColumnsAdd
data.comment: Button that adds the selected available column to the shown list.

data.name: ksConfigureColumnsRemove
data.comment: Button that removes the selected shown column.

data.name: ksConfigureColumnsMoveUp
data.comment: Button that moves the selected shown column up one position.

data.name: ksConfigureColumnsMoveDown
data.comment: Button that moves the selected shown column down one position.

data.name: ksConfigureColumnsNeedsAColumn
data.value: A browse view must have at least one column.
data.comment: Validation message shown when the user tries to remove the last shown column.
